query: DELETE FROM pipeline_stages WHERE `pipelineId` NOT IN (1, 2); DELETE FROM pipeline_automations WHERE `sourcePipelineId` NOT IN (1, 2) OR `targetPipelineId` NOT IN (1, 2); DELETE FROM pipelines WHERE id NOT IN (1, 2);
